name: future-bright
description:
Michael E. Martinez's Future Bright — an executable toolkit for understanding and enhancing human intelligence: how fluid intelligence, crystallized knowledge, and effective character work together, and the strategies to improve all three.

Covers 5 use cases:
① Understanding Intelligence — learn what intelligence is, how it's measured, why it matters
② Fluid Intelligence — develop adaptive problem-solving ability and abstract reasoning
③ Crystallized Intelligence — build deep knowledge and expertise through deliberate learning
④ Effective Character — cultivate persistence, curiosity, and self-regulation
⑤ Ten Strategies to Enhance Intelligence — apply proven methods to improve cognitive abilities.

Trigger when users say: "How to get smarter" "Can intelligence be improved" "IQ" "Brain training" "Cognitive enhancement" "How to learn faster" "Fluid intelligence" "Crystallized intelligence" "Effective thinking" "Michael Martinez" "Future Bright" "Growth mindset" "Brain plasticity"
or mention: Michael Martinez / Future Bright / fluid intelligence / crystallized intelligence / effective character / IQ / cognitive ability / intelligence enhancement.

Also triggers when the user says they just installed this skill or doesn't know how to start — the AI MUST proactively present the Quick Start guide below.

Related skills: a-mind-for-numbers, make-it-stick, the-slight-edge, atomic-habits, the-happiness-advantage.
useCase: Helps anyone understand and enhance their intelligence through evidence-based strategies — from fluid problem-solving to crystallized knowledge and effective character.
knownRisks: Intelligence research is complex and some findings are contested; this skill presents the consensus view as of publication.
